ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To Jun-23-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval Of Voluntary Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RITA EVANS', AN INDIVIDUAL AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, Motion For Court Approval Of Voluntary Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice.

The unopposed motion for dismissal of the entire action without prejudice is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
